description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a rough, weathered surface and a distinct fossil-like pattern embedded on one side. The stone's coloration ranges from light tan to dark brown, with the fossil area appearing much darker and featuring ribbed, segmented textures reminiscent of ancient marine life. The overall form is somewhat oval, with one side flatter and the other more convex, suggesting it could have once been part of a larger rock formation. The surface is uneven, with visible pitting, ridges, and natural indentations, giving it a rugged, natural appearance. The fossil pattern is the most visually striking feature, adding both historical and aesthetic interest. This stone would likely be found in a landscaped urban park or as a decorative element along a pathway.
description: A rugged, tan-to-brown stone featuring a prominent dark fossil pattern and a rough, weathered surface. Its irregular shape and textured details make it visually striking and naturalistic.
description_view_0: The stone appears mostly tan and rounded, with a rough, pitted surface and no visible fossil pattern from this angle.
description_view_1: This side reveals the dark, ribbed fossil pattern embedded in the stone, contrasting with the lighter, textured rock.
description_view_2: From above, the full extent of the fossil pattern is visible, showing its segmented, oval shape dominating the stone's surface.
description_view_3: The fossil pattern is again visible, curving along the stone's side, with the rough, tan rock forming the base.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or partially embedded in the ground
attribute_pattern: Distinct ribbed fossil pattern on one side, with irregular, natural pitting and rough texturing across the rest of the surface.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered, with visible surface pitting and erosion indicating prolonged exposure to natural elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with manicured urban landscaping but can blend with other natural stones or decorative gravel; may be partially surrounded by grass or mulch.
